name: restart-kill10-v1
description: Restart/persistence scenario. Replay the 20-turn conversation; after the assistant answers turn 10, SAVE the slot, KILL the server, restart it, RESTORE the slot, then continue turns 11-20. The turn-11..20 prompts reference facts established in turns 1-10, so a correct+reused restore lets the model answer them without re-reading the whole history. Compared against a cold control that recomputes the 10-turn history after restart.

controls.cold_recompute: After restart, do NOT restore; send the full turn-1..11 history cold. Its TTFT/prompt_n is the baseline the restored path is compared against.
controls.checks: Every resumed turn runs the reuse assertion (prompt_n_warm <= new_input_tokens + 8). Turn 11 also runs the verified-restore probe (64 greedy tokens byte-diff vs the cold-recompute control).
